saṃ-√duṣ P. -duṣyati, to become utterly corrupt or polluted or unclean,  MBh.  :
Caus. -dūṣayati (ind.p. -dūṣya), to corrupt, vitiate, defile, stain, spoil,  R. ;  Suśr. ;  Rājat. ;
to revile, abuse, censure, expose to shame or infamy,  MBh. ;  Kām.

results.rendered_html:
saṃduṣ 4 P. To be defiled or stained.
— Caus.
1 To defile, pollute, corrupt, soil, taint.
2 To violate.
3 To accuse, censure, find fault with, condemn.
